overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim walking through a historic Middle Eastern city. The character navigates from narrow cobblestone streets through a bustling market, up stairs to a plaza with a mosque and minaret, and finally into a garden with blooming trees. The scene features warm sunlight, historic Islamic architecture, and moderate pedestrian activity.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone street toward an open market square. A large stone archway marks the entrance on the left, while a tall palm tree stands in the center. To the right, a market stall with an orange canopy displays pottery. The view is briefly obscured by a wooden railing as the character passes close to a fence around the 7-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with vendor stalls and hay cart

events.description: character turns left toward building with red awning

agents.ego_description: navigating through the market, turning toward a building with a red fabric canopy

notable_agents.action: man in brown robes walking past the character

entered.detail: building entrance with hanging red fabric canopy
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked on the street
wide stone staircase leading upward to plaza

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the market district, passing by a wooden hay cart on the right. A building with a prominent red fabric awning appears ahead. The character turns left toward this building, navigating around pedestrians in brown and green robes. Stone stairs leading upward become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with blue-tiled mosque and minaret

events.description: entering main plaza with domed mosque building

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps into a large open plaza with a blue-tiled mosque and tall minaret

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing near the mosque entrance

entered.detail: historic mosque with intricate blue tile decoration and multiple white domes
tall cylindrical stone minaret with balcony

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase into a grand open plaza dominated by a magnificent mosque with blue tilework and white domes. A tall minaret rises on the right side of the frame. Groups of robed NPCs gather near the mosque entrance. The hay cart and red-awning building fall behind as the plaza opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden courtyard with blooming judas trees and flowering vines

events.description: entering garden area with blooming pink judas trees
character slows to observe the garden surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking through a beautiful garden courtyard with blooming pink trees and blue flowering vines, observing the architecture

entered.detail: tree with vibrant pink blossoms scattered on the ground
blue flowering vines climbing the mud brick walls
simple wooden bench against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a serene garden courtyard filled with vibrant pink blooming trees and blue flowering vines climbing the walls. The minaret is now visible on the left side of the frame, indicating the character has circled around. A wooden bench sits against the right wall. The character slows down to observe the beautiful surroundings as pink petals scatter across the cobblestones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the narrow, shaded corridors of a stone street into a grand, sunlit plaza and finally into a serene garden. It begins by following the character past a large stone archway and a central palm tree, gliding by a pottery stall with an orange canopy before a wooden railing briefly obscures the view. As the character moves deeper into the market district, the scene shifts past a wooden hay cart and a building with a red fabric awning, weaving through pedestrians in robes toward a set of distant stone stairs. The camera then ascends these stairs as the environment opens up into a magnificent plaza dominated by a blue-tiled mosque and a towering minaret. Finally, the view turns away from the plaza and enters a quiet courtyard where the architecture is softened by vibrant pink blooming trees and blue flowering vines scattering petals across the cobblestones.
